title: Have Status change progress Percentage - Canceled
excerpt: Wondering if anyone else is having this issue. I have status progress not showing as 100% because of several canceled task. It is important to us to show the task that were canceld and not archive them. Does anyone have …

posts.author: protolj (Louis Proto)
posts.cookedHtml: Wondering if anyone else is having this issue. I have status progress not showing as 100% because of several canceled task. It is important to us to show the task that were canceld and not archive them. Does anyone have a workaround or would love to see this as an added feature. Being able to select which status’s specifically count toward the progress percentage. So if a status changes to Canceled it wouldn’t count toward total (when summarizing to main task) or 100%.
